This entry covers the operator-review iteration rounds and final PDF production for briefs/2026-06-05_dtc_paid_ads_brief_hubert_yee.md: (1) PR #153 — clarified QR-pay email capture happens simultaneously via Stripe checkout (no separate opt-in); (2) PR #154 — added ledger-sourced cost structure section 4a from Main Ledger tabs Currencies / Agroverse Cacao Processing Cost / Agroverse Price Components (farm-gate R$100/kg, Bahia processing rates, freight $0.12/oz, landed 200g bag $8.32-9.29, landed 50g bar ~$2.05, tree execution $1.50); (3) PR #155 — corrected events to offline, added USD5/unit tree-planting set-aside throughout the economics, corrected stale Feb 2026 crawl finding (Ora Cacao does sell on Amazon.com) and logged the correction to agentic_ai_context CONTEXT_UPDATES.md. Regenerated the styled weasyprint PDF after each round; final 7-page PDF attached.
